scripts.dev: pnpm build:frontend && cd backend && pnpm start:dev
scripts.install:all: cd backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend && pnpm install
scripts.deploy: pnpm install:all && pnpm build:all && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only backend
scripts.deploy:reload: git pull && pnpm install:all && pnpm build:all && pm2 delete all && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only backend
scripts.deploy:dev: pm2 delete all || true && NODE_ENV=development pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only backend
